title: Chassalia corallioides
intro: Chassalia corallioides, also known as Coral Coral, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Chassalia corallioides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Chassalia corallioides include teas, infusions, and tonics, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the respiratory and digestive systems.
